full_text:
Spleen tissue was predominantly necrotic according to Anni Virtanen, and the tumor purity was around 70%.

Ashwini Nagaraj: Approximately 3 cm tissue was finely minced in a sterile petri dish. Then, it was dissociated in 30 mL of Dispase + RQ1-RNAse free DNAse diluted in AdDF+++ medium according to the protocol.

Abhilash continued from tissue filtration till the final cell count.

There was a big red pellet after the enzymatic digestion and filtration. So, the RBS lysis was performed 2x using 4ml of lysis buffer.

Final pellet was resuspended in 5 mL of organoid dissociating medium

Cell count 1):

total: 1.07 E6

live: 3.2 E5

viability: 30 %

Size: 7.8 um

Cell count 2):

total: 1.32 E6

live: 4.48 E5

viability: 34 %

Size: 7.6 um

Average cell count: 1.2 E6 / mL

Total volume: 5 mL

Final cell count: 6 E6 cells

A) Drug treatment for IF in 384-well plate

Take 3.75ml of final cell suspension, spin down at 1000rpm for 10 min at +4. Resusped the pellet in 5 ml of iPDC culture medium. Aliquot 1.25ml per tube * 4 tubes for preparing omentum gel mixture (see below).

Leave outer wells empty = __ wells were plated with cells.

300 wells x 20 µl = 6000 µl

prepare the mix for 300 wells 750 cells/µl*20ul = 4.5E6 cells needed in total

→ make 4 x of 1500µl omegel plus cells mixture  in a 2.0 ml tube

→ 750 cells/µl*6000 ul= 4.5 E6 divided into 4 tubes= 1.125 E6 per tube

volume to take from cell suspension (µl) for 1500 ul of omentum gel mix *4 tubes

Cells + Culture medium →1250   µl

Ome-gel       →    212         µl

Aprotinin     →   5.0         µl

Thrombin    →    4.5         µl

Fibrinogen  →    30         µl

NOTE: Fibrinogen should be added just before pipetting to the wells. So, add everything to all 4 tubes except Fibrinogen. When you are ready to pipette add Fibrinogen one by one to each tube.

Remaining (extra)mix from last tube was plated into 48 well plate *20 wells/40ul/well for scRNAseq of control samples

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 25 µl medium

→ Next day add drugs using Tecan drug dispenser

B) Flow cytometry 49 well plate

After plating the cells in 384 wells according to the drug treatment plan. The 4th vial was found to be extra. So,

Out of 4 vials of 1.5ml of Omentumgel mixture, one vial was plated in 48 well plate for flow cytometry (control) at the endpoint (*36 wells).

C) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ One vial with 1.5E6 cells was collected and stained with the antibodies from the drug testing panel according to the protocol.

C) Sample for cryo

As there were no cells left after culturing and flow cytometry, cells were not frozen.

Prepare mL of iPDC medium with cytokines

For 384 wells 25ul*384=9.6 ml

For 48 wells 350ul*36=13ml

Total medium prepared: 40ml

Next day (day 1):

plate (1): For IF drug treatments

There were no visible tumor cells in the wells. Therefore, did not proceed with the drug treatment in384 wells for IF staininng

Flow cytometry from the cells in 48 well plate

As there were immune cells in the wells, we went ahead to test the effect of anti-TIGIT antibody and its combination with cisplatin, and pembrolizumab.

Prepare the stocks for drug testing in a 48 well plate as follows:

Prepare 9X stocks of each of the drugs so that 50 uL of each drug are added in the corresponding well. Final total volume per well after adding the drugs should be 450 uL. For example, for a layout like the following, the amounts to add of each liquid are indicated below:

Now, to prepare the stocks:

Cisplatin:

9X = 4.5 uM

From the 2 mg/mL stock prepared for the 384 well take 677.7 uL and mix with 322.3 uL of pre-warmed water. From this stock, make a 1:1000 dilution by taking 1 uL and mixing it with 999 uL of pre-warmed water. The 1:1000 dilution will be the 9X stock. If three conditions include cisplatin 0.5 uM, a total of 900 uL will be needed (50*6*3), so 1000 uL is fine.

Tiragolumab:

9X = 90 ug/mL

Commercial stock concentration = 4.1 mg/mL

From the commercial stock, take 28.5 uL and mix with 1271.5 uL of complete media. If four conditions include tiragolumab, a total of 1200 uL will be needed (50*6*4), so 1300 uL is fine.

Pembrolizumab:

9X = 45 ug/mL 
Commercial stock concentration: 6.1 mg/mL

From the commercial stock, take 5.9 uL and mix with 794.1 uL of complete media. If two conditions include pembrolizumab, a total of 600 uL will be needed (50*6*2), so 800 uL is fine.

Note: Cisplatin 0.5uM treatment contained 5 wells instead of 6

End point ( day 4 / day 3 of drug treatment)

On day 3 of the drug-treatment, the cells were harvested for flow cytometry

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
